privileged_info_summary: The patient data for Sherill Botsford (ID 10, DOB 1995-01-24) is synthetic, generated by Synthea and loaded via patients.sql into the FreeMED database. The task instructions accurately reflect the required data inputs for the preventive care protocol, including vitals (BP 118/76, HR 68, Temp 98.2, Weight 145, Height 65), vaccines (Tdap and Influenza with specific lots/dates/manufacturers), and a 2026-03-01 follow-up, which are strictly validated by the verifier.
